productDisplayName: Timberland Unisex Balm Proofer Shoe Accessories
description: Water-based Balm Proofer all purpose protector restores water and stain repellency to our waterproof footwear and apparel and protects against stains caused by salt and oil. Ideal for most types of footwear, clothing and accessories. Contains Bitrex to prevent accidental ingestion. Method of application Surface must be clean and dry before application Spray product evenly from a distance of 6-8 inches until entire surface is thoroughly covered Do not spot protect as it may cause slight shade variances After 1-2 minutes, gently wipe entire surface with a clean damp cloth to remove any excess liquid and prevent drips Blow dry using a warm setting or tumble dry garments separately according to care instructions Allow to air dry completely Gently brush suede and nubuck products with our Rubber Sole Brush or our Suede Brush to restore the color and raise the nap Re-apply product at first signs of diminished repellency Test on a small inconspicuous area before applying the full application, as some colors may darken.
